blurb.en: Across all three pools, BTC-USD is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 43.3% from its peak, with RSI at the 10th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 94.6/100.
blurb.zh: 本期三個池子中，BTC-USD 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 43.3%，RSI 百分位 10%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：94.6/100。

blurb.en: WMT has dipped 14.6% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 2th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 66.8/100.
blurb.zh: WMT 距 52 週高點下滑 14.6%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 2 百分位，動能明顯收縮。智能定投評分：66.8/100。

blurb.en: COIN is down 56.5% from its high, placing RSI at the 42th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our formula tends to find value. Entry score: 79.0/100.
blurb.zh: COIN 距高點下跌 56.5%，RSI 歷史百分位 42%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：79.0/100。

blurb.en: ETH-USD has pulled back 57.4% with RSI at the 13th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Not your typical recommendation. Smart DCA score: 93.2/100.
blurb.zh: ETH-USD 回撤 57.4%，RSI 百分位 13%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。非典型推薦，公式評分：93.2/100。
